# Why Your Class Schedule Isn't Showing on the Planner

Source: https://heliumedu.freshdesk.com/support/solutions/articles/159000418668

If your class schedules are missing from the Planner, check the following common causes:

## 1\. Check Your Filters

The Planner has filter options that control what's displayed. If **Remember filter selections** is enabled (found in [**Settings → Preferences**](https://app.heliumedu.com/settings)), filters from a previous session may still be active.

  * A highlighted filter indicator means filters are currently active
  * Verify that **Class Schedules** is selected in the filters
  * Confirm that the relevant class filters aren't excluding the class you're looking for

## 2\. The Class Group Is Hidden

If a class group is hidden, none of its classes or assignments will appear on the Planner. Check [**Classes**](https://app.heliumedu.com/classes)—hidden groups display a closed eye icon. Tap the icon to make the group visible again.

## 3\. You Haven't Created a Schedule for the Class

Class schedules only appear if they've been set up on the class itself. See [Setting Up and Managing Classes](https://heliumedu.freshdesk.com/support/solutions/articles/159000427002) for more details.

## 4\. Wrong View

The **Todos** view displays only Assignments—Class Schedules will not appear there. Switch to **Week** , **Day** , **Month** , or **Agenda** view.

## 5\. Term Date Mismatch

Class schedules are generated based on the start and end date range of the class (and its term). Double-check that the dates you're viewing in the Planner are within the date range configured for the class.

## Related Articles

  * [Setting Up and Managing Classes](https://heliumedu.freshdesk.com/support/solutions/articles/159000427002)

---

## Helium Classic

The same troubleshooting steps apply in Helium Classic. The key navigation differences are:

  * The **Remember filter selections** setting is at [**Account → Settings → Preferences**](https://www.heliumedu.com/settings/#tab-preferences)
  * [**Classes**](https://www.heliumedu.com/planner/classes) is found under the Planner menu
  * To add a schedule: click on the class → click **Schedule** → select days and times → click **Save**

 __Helium Classic will remain available until July 31, 2026.__
